testcase.name: testLogoPresent

SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. juin 11, 2026 12:25:08 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch AVERTISSEMENT: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 juin 11, 2026 12:25:08 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 AVERTISSEMENT: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
